subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Threshold of the Most Glorious Beauty, render thanks unto God that in this mighty century and this glorious age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان آستان جمال ابهی حمد کنید خدا را که در این قرن عظیم و عصر مجید قدم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
